message:
🐛 Fix latest-season default and play icon on streams (#27)

- Fix _initSeason: skip when no seasons, re-init when season count changes
- Previously unvisited shows now correctly default to latest season
- All streams show play icon (not download) since action is always play
- Cached streams shown with full opacity, non-cached slightly dimmed

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
